දැවීලා තැවීලා හා
නැසීලා Love  වීලා මා
සෑදීලා පේවීලා කෙරුව
පෙමක වීලා තෘතීක මා
අවරට බැලුම් බලාං
හිටගෙන ලපං ගහාං
පද නැති බෙරේ පලාගෙන
ගෑණී යන්ට ගියා මල කෝලාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....

උඹගේ රට හාවා .,
මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා .,
ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් //
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

හිටවලා ඇති දැන් බතල කටින්
කරලම තියෙන්නේ පවම කයින්
දිරවන් නැති උබේ අමුතු ලයින්
වැඩි පුර කිව්වොත් දෙන්නේ පයින්
හය හත වෙනකොට දාගෙන කඩේ
බොරුහිල තිබ්බට උලුදුයි වඩේ
නාටක පෙන්නන් ආවට නඩේ
මැද්දට පැනලා කියපන් "අඩේ"

මුලින්ම දැක්කම පෙම් හමුවීම
ආංගානියේ තුරුලට වීම
ඇලීම ගැලීම වෙලීම තැවීම
අඩ අඩ බලපං දෙවෙනි ඉනිම
බදින්නේ ගහං තොරාං
ණයයිලු හතර වරාං
ලැබුනොත් දේව වරාම්
නුඹ දක්කං යන්නම් මගේ කොරාං

ඒ රන් කද නම් මගේ රන් එතනා
ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....
උඹගේ රට හාවා ., මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා ., ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන් 
මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
මේකනම් මේකනම් මේකනම්  පිස්සුවක් බන්

ඒ රන් කලවම් උන රන් කෙවිටා
රන්රඹුටන් කඩන් එනවා
රන්වන් පාටයි සමණලයා....
උඹගේ රට හාවා ., මේ මට කොලේ වහලා
ඌ පැන පැන ආවා..,
ඒ ගුටි කන මූණා ., ගොටුකොළ කන්නා.,
දැන් ඇති වද දුන්නා...

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්
හැදිලා කැස්සක් බන්
වහිනවා වැස්සක් බන්
මට දැනෙන්නේ මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

මේකනම් පිස්සුවක් බන්

snippet.title: Harith Wijeratne - Hemin Sare Piya Wida (හෙමින් සෑරේ) | Blind Auditions | The Voice Sri Lanka
snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice". 

Official Facebook Page - https://www.facebook.com/TheVoiceSriLankaOfficial
Official Instagram - https://www.instagram.com/thevoicesrilanka
Subscribe Sirasa TV on Youtube : https://bit.ly/3sCpWEz

#TheVoiceSL #SirasaTV #TheVoiceSriLanka #TheVoiceSL #TheVoiceLK #VoiceSriLanka #VoiceLK #lka

snippet.title: මිලියන 20ක ආදරය දිනූ ෂුක්රා පළමු වරට හෙළි කළ අඳුරු අතීතය.| Lakshapathi - සිරස ලක්ෂපති ජයග්‍රාහිකාව
snippet.description:
🔺 මෙවර සිරස ලක්ෂපති වැඩසටහනේ මිලියන 2 ජයග්‍රහණය කළ ගාල්ලේ පදිංචි 17 හැවිරිදි වියේ පසුවන ෂුක්රා මුනව්වර් සමග නිව්ස්ෆස්ට් කළ විශේෂ කතා බහ..

🔺 Exclusive interview with the winner of Sirasa Lakshapathi, Shukra Munawwar, from Katugoda, Galle

02:25 ෂුක්රා ඔබේ නම හරියටම උච්චාරණය කරන්නේ කොහොමද? 
03:00 මිලියන 02 මිලියන 20ක් කියලා පැටලුණු හේතුව මෙන්න..
04:50 ලැප්ටොප් හීනය..
06:45 ගොඩක් අවස්ථාවල මම ප්‍රතික්ෂේප වීම්වලට ලකවුණු කෙනෙක්..
08:15 ලක්ෂපති මුලින්ම බලපු විදිය..
10:06 11 වසර වෙනකොට ෂුක්රා වෙනස් වුණා?
12:30 පොඩි කාලේ ඉදලම දුප්පත් ජීවිතයක් ගත කළේ..
13:30 මේ රටේ දුප්පත් දරුවන්ට තියෙන ලොකුම ප්‍රශ්නය ඔන්ලයින් අධ්‍යාපනය
16:00 අමු ඉරටුවලට ෂුක්රාගෙන් පණිවිඩයක්

snippet.title: 3D PEN VS GLUE GUN! 17 Cool Hacks And Crafts For You
snippet.description:
We’ve tried every 3D pen and hot glue craft we could imagine, and here’s what we created. Aren’t 3D pens just amazing? You can create anything you can think of, make it colorful and give it purpose. Today, we wanted to experiment with something new, and we wanted to show you some amazing hacks you can create at home. But first, let’s try some experiments with hot glue. Why buy a bath mat when you can make a colorful one with glitter using hot glue? To make it look store-bought, use a printed pattern and some greaseproof paper on top. Sometimes charging your phone becomes a nuisance, so today, we show you how to create a stand for your phone using a 3D pen. But for those of you who want to get craftier, we show you how to make a beautiful romantic ring from scratch using a 3D pen. Watch until the end to discover some fantastic tricks and crafts you’ll adore. 

Timestamps: 

1:06 — How to fix a broken wood piece 

2:25 — DIY ring 

2:48 — Beautiful, DIY jewelry holder 

4:15 — DIY hair comb 

6:53 — Cute DIY earrings 

9:03 — DIY fake nails
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: Diwyangana (දිව්‍යාංගනා) - Gihan Vithanage (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Diwyangana (දිව්‍යාංගනා) - Gihan Vithanage (Official Music Video)

Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/3EUmaNLxyhdrWJaY5BTkzi
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/204801022
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13726500
Amazon Prime Music: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B08VN8F6DQ

Song Lyrics: 
සීත පිණි බිංදු මන්දාරමේ
ඔබේ රුවින් මත් වෙලා..
පාට මල් අතර සිත්තම් කලේ..
ඔබේ රුවයි හිතෙනවා..

දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..
පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා..
දිව්‍යාංගනා ඔබ ද මේ විශ්වයෙ..
මගෙ වෙන්න මටමම මැවූ..
නෙත් බන්දනා රූපෙ හිමිකරු ඔබේ..
මම නේද මියෙනා තුරූ..

සංසාරයේ පුරුදු බැල්මෙන් නුරා..
මගේ හිතම සුවපත් කලා..
ඇහිබැම්ම දේදුන්න සේ පායලා ..
මගෙ හිත් අහසෙ ඔබ ඉන්නවා ..
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ..පන වාගෙ මං රකිනවා

හදවතෙහි ඉඩ තියෙන අස්සක් පුරා ..
ඔබේ රූපෙ මිහිදන් වෙලා...
වෑහෙද්දි සුදු පාට කම්මුල් පුරා ...
මනමාලයි ඔබේ පෙම් හිනා
දෙවියන් ද මට දුන්නේ මේ ආදරේ ...
පනවාගෙ මං රකිනවා ...

snippet.title: Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching
snippet.description:
Simran Emotional Scene || Best Scence || Heart Touching Emotional Scene || Best Heart Touching

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model, and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam, and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). In the same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: විදේශගත ලාංකික කතක් ගෝඨාගේ කලිසම ගලවයි
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies
snippet.description:
Simran Blockbuster Full HD Movie | Hello Mama Dubbed Movie | Tamil Full Length Movies| Online Movies

Simran Bagga (born Rishibhala Naval; 4 April 1976), known mononymously as Simran, is an Indian film actress, producer, classical dancer, model and television personality. She has predominantly appeared in Tamil and Telugu films, as well as a few films in Hindi, Malayalam and Kannada. She is well noted for her dancing and acting skills in the Indian film industry. In her long movie career, she has won three Filmfare Awards South, one Tamil Nadu State Film Award for Best Actress, three Cinema Express Awards, two Kalaimamani Awards, several regional awards and nominations.

Although Simran initially aspired to become a fashion designer, she accepted offers to join the Indian film industry, which came as a result of her fame as an anchor in the show Superhit Muqabla. Having acted in a few Hindi films, she later achieved her first success with Tere Mere Sapne (1996) alongside Arshad Warsi. Subsequently, she made her debut in South Indian cinema through the Malayalam film Indraprastham (1996) and Kannada film Simhada Mari (1997). The same year, she debuted in Tamil through V. I. P. (1997) and was followed by a string of commercial successes in her early career. In 1999, Simran received critical praise in the Tamil films Thulladha Manamum Thullum (1999) and Vaali (1999), establishing herself as the most successful actress in Tamil cinema at the time. At the peak of her career she agreed to play the role of an antagonist in Parthen Rasithen (2000) and a suffering woman from a premarital agreement in Priyamaanavale (2000), both went on to become commercial and critical successes.

Simran received her first Filmfare Award for Best Tamil Actress for Kannathil Muthamittal (2002),[3] as the mother of an adopted 9-year-old daughter. Simran had also appeared in two comedy films alongside Kamal Haasan; Pammal K. Sambandam and Panchathantiram, both released in 2002. In Telugu, Simran starred in a series of commercially successful films; Samarasimha Reddy (1999), Kalisundam Raa (2000) and Narasimha Naidu (2001), and for latter both, she received Filmfare Award for Best Telugu Actress nomination. Simran left the film industry following her marriage with her childhood family friend Deepak Bagga in 2004.[4] In 2008, she made a comeback to Tamil cinema with Vaaranam Aayiram, where she played a mother and a wife to the characters played by Suriya and won the Filmfare Award for Best Supporting Actress.[5]

snippet.title: Godzilla vs. Kong – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
In theaters and streaming exclusively on @HBOMax* March 26.
 
*Available on @HBOMax in the US only, for 31 days, at no extra cost to subscribers.

https://www.godzillavskong.com/
https://www.facebook.com/GodzillaVsKong
https://www.instagram.com/godzillavskong/
https://twitter.com/GodzillaVsKong

---

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes the long-awaited face-off between two icons, “Godzilla vs. Kong,” the next epic adventure in Legendary’s cinematic Monsterverse, directed by Adam Wingard.

Legends collide in “Godzilla vs. Kong” as these mythic adversaries meet in a spectacular battle for the ages, with the fate of the world hanging in the balance.  Kong and his protectors undertake a perilous journey to find his true home, and with them is Jia, a young orphaned girl with whom he has formed a unique and powerful bond.  But they unexpectedly find themselves in the path of an enraged Godzilla, cutting a swath of destruction across the globe.  The epic clash between the two titans—instigated by unseen forces—is only the beginning of the mystery that lies deep within the core of the Earth.

The film stars Alexander Skarsgård (“Big Little Lies,” “The Little Drummer Girl”), Millie Bobby Brown (“Stranger Things”), Rebecca Hall (“Christine,” “Professor Marston and the Wonder Women”), Brian Tyree Henry (“Joker,” “Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse”), Shun Oguri (“Weathering with You”), Eiza González (“Fast & Furious Presents: Hobbs & Shaw”), Julian Dennison (“Deadpool 2”), with Kyle Chandler (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”) and Demián Bichir (“The Nun,” “The Hateful Eight”).
Wingard (“The Guest,” “You’re Next”) directed from a screenplay by Eric Pearson (“Thor: Ragnarok”) and Max Borenstein (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters,” “Kong: Skull Island”), story by Terry Rossio (“Pirates of the Caribbean: Dead Men Tell No Tales”) and Michael Dougherty & Zach Shields (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), based on the character “Godzilla” owned and created by TOHO CO., LTD.  The film was produced by Mary Parent, Alex Garcia, Eric McLeod, Jon Jashni, Thomas Tull and Brian Rogers, with Jay Ashenfelter, Herbert W. Gains, Dan Lin, Roy Lee, Yoshimitsu Banno and Kenji Okuhira executive producing.

The director’s behind-the-scenes creative team included director of photography Ben Seresin (“The Mummy,” “World War Z”), production designers Owen Paterson (“Jumanji: Welcome to the Jungle,” “Godzilla”) and Thomas S. Hammock (“Blair Witch”), editor Josh Schaeffer (“Godzilla: King of the Monsters”), costume designer Ann Foley (“Skyscraper”) and visual effects supervisor John “DJ” DesJardin (upcoming “Zack Snyder’s Justice League”).

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present a Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Adam Wingard, “Godzilla vs. Kong.”  The film will be released nationwide in 2D and 3D in select theaters and IMAX on March 26, 2021 and will be available in the U.S. on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release.  It is rated PG-13 for intense sequences of creature violence/destruction and brief language.

snippet.title: 28 PARENTING HACKS From Crafty Moms And Dads || Tips for Being Friends with Your Child
snippet.description:
Tips and tricks every parent will be thankful for. 

Being a parent isn’t an easy task, and most of the time, parents come across more problems than they can solve. Well, to help you out, I wanted to share with you some amazing hacks that will save you time and the hassle that comes with taking care of a little one. Painting is everyone’s favorite activity, but it can be very messy — and clothes get destroyed. So, to keep your little one’s outfit nice and clean, use a plastic bag as an apron for them. Toddlers tend to drop their pacifiers all the time, and once the pacifier is down, it needs to be cleaned. To prevent that from happening, tie the pacifier on a balloon. You can use a closet organizer and label it for each day of the week to make sure that picking outfits for the day won’t take hours. Watch until the end to discover all the genius parenting hacks you need to know. 

Timestamps: 

0:31 — The pacifier hack 

2:42 — A little water, pepper, and soap experiment 

5:32 — The getting along/best friends’ shirt 

7:20 — Face mask too big? Try this hack 

8:58 — Tasty gummy bear lollies
This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

ආයු කාලේ නිමා වෙන්නට කලියෙන් ගෙන ආව
කවුරු කවුරුත් වෙහෙස වෙන්නේ අරමුණු වෙත යන්න
හොඳම කාලේ ගෙවී යනකොට ජීවිතයේ තියෙන
මගේ ලෝකේ රිදුණු තැන් වල වැඩිපුර හිටියෙ නුඹ

අමුතුම මලක් වාගෙ ලස්සනක් දැක්කෙ මං  ඔබ ගාවයි
ඒ සුන්දරත්වයට පැල්ලමක් එකතු වෙයි හරි ලෝබයි
ඔය අත් දෙකෙන් දුන්න ආදරේ රහට නම් තව ආසයි
හිත නිස්කලංකවම පැත්තකට වෙන්න දැන් අවස්ථාවයි

මෙන්න කියා පෙන්නුවත් හිතේ යට තියෙනා දේ මිනිසුන්ගේ
දන්න කෙනෙක් කොහෙවත් නෑ හරියට පොතේ පතේවත් නැහැනේ
සතුටයි සහ කඳුලයි මැද ඇත්තේ නූලක වෙනසයි

පින්න වැටී දිස්නයක් ගෙනාවට ඉර දැක්කම හැංගේවී
ඉන්න හිතපු අය ලඟින් ඉන්නවද යන්න හිතෙනකොට යාවී
ඔබවයි සහ මාවයි මේ සොබාදහමටත් මතකයි

 Flute - Chamith Heshan
▶Recording, Mix & Mastered - Dilshan L Silva @Sa-One Entertainment

ආයු කාලේ නිමා වෙන්නට කලියෙන් ගෙන ආව
කවුරු කවුරුත් වෙහෙස වෙන්නේ අරමුණු වෙත යන්න
හොඳම කාලේ ගෙවී යනකොට ජීවිතයේ තියෙන
මගේ ලෝකේ රිදුණු තැන් වල වැඩිපුර හිටියෙ නුඹ

අමුතුම මලක් වාගෙ ලස්සනක් දැක්කෙ මං  ඔබ ගාවයි
ඒ සුන්දරත්වයට පැල්ලමක් එකතු වෙයි හරි ලෝබයි
ඔය අත් දෙකෙන් දුන්න ආදරේ රහට නම් තව ආසයි
හිත නිස්කලංකවම පැත්තකට වෙන්න දැන් අවස්ථාවයි

මෙන්න කියා පෙන්නුවත් හිතේ යට තියෙනා දේ මිනිසුන්ගේ
දන්න කෙනෙක් කොහෙවත් නෑ හරියට පොතේ පතේවත් නැහැනේ
සතුටයි සහ කඳුලයි මැද ඇත්තේ නූලක වෙනසයි

පින්න වැටී දිස්නයක් ගෙනාවට ඉර දැක්කම හැංගේවී
ඉන්න හිතපු අය ලඟින් ඉන්නවද යන්න හිතෙනකොට යාවී
ඔබවයි සහ මාවයි මේ සොබාදහමටත් මතකයි

snippet.description:
The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice One of the most successful reality TV formats in the world. Extremely successful in 180 countries. 
SRI LANKA’S NEWEST TELEVISION EXPERIENCE - The Voice Sri Lanka

The Voice is an international reality television singing competition franchise of Dutch origin. It is based on the reality singing competition The Voice of Holland, which was originally created by Dutch television producer John de Mol. The show's format features five stages of competition: producers' auditions, blind auditions, battle rounds, knockouts (since 2012), and live performance shows.

A combined 438 singers have won The Voice, The Voice Kids, The Voice Teens and The Voice Senior in 145 countries/regions. Each winner is given a recording contract, a monetary prize, and a title as that nation's "Voice".

snippet.title: Prageeth Perera - Anurawee (අනුරාවී) Official Music Video
snippet.description:
Prageeth Perera - Anurawee (අනුරාවී) Official Music Video

● Artist: Prageeth Perera Ft. Skay Jay
● Music: Prageeth Perera
● Lyrics: Kelum Dissanayake
● Rap Lyrics: Skay Jay
● Director: Chamu Sri
● Dop: Srinika Liyanage
● Cast: RV Ravindu, Maneesha Amarasinghe
● Dance Choreography: RV Dance Studio

🎵 Stream/Download:
iTunes: https://music.apple.com/lk/album/anurawee-feat-skay-jay-single/1549445711
Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/album/4VFoPkNPOCdeVX2QenvIXH
Deezer: https://www.deezer.com/us/album/200808042
Yandex Music: https://music.yandex.com/album/13523643
Amazon Music: https://music.amazon.com/albums/B08T88SVH6

Lyrics:
ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා
ස්වර්ග රසේද මවා ගෙනල්ලා
හැඟුම් පුරෝලා
රෑ තුන් යාමේ රඟදේවී 
රාග කසාය මුවින් නොඉල්ලා
ඉඟිබිඟි පාලා
අවසානේ නොවෙයි මේ ඇරඹුමයි
මගේ පෙම් කතාවේ
ජීවත්වෙනතුරු මෙමා ඔබ නමින්
හුස්ම ගැහුනාවේ..//

මේ විශල් නිශායමේ සුපෙම් නුරාගයේ
ඒ දෙතොල් පුරා මැවී සියුම් නුරා රසේ
මා හදේ කපාටයේ නැඟී රතී සුවේ
සාදරෙන් කතා උනේ සුසුම් අපේ ප්‍රේමා ගින්නේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

Rap
රසේ මතු කරන ඇගේ ලතාවන්
මගේ මනස තුල ඇඳෙයි රටාවන්
මලේ සුවඳ මත වශී උනා මං
අපේ කතාවේ ඔයා විලාසිතාව
රඟදේවී දෙතොල් මැද තනිවේවී
මත්‍ රස නෙත් අග මං පැටලේවී
මත් උන සිතුවිලි දැන් ගලාව්ඒවී
කලඹාවී සිත මගෙ අනුරාවී

සායමින් වැසූ ඇගේ කොපුල් තටාකයේ
පීනමින් සරාගයේ ලැබූ සුමෝහනේ
ප්‍රේමනීය සෘතුවේ හැමූ සරාලියේ
මේ වසන්තයයි අපේ විඳින්න එක්වෙන්න ජීවිතේ
සුරම්‍ය තුසීත හැඟුම් ගෙනා අනුරාවී

ඈ ශෘංගාරෙන් මත්වීලා....

▶ Subscribe To Official Channel: https://bit.ly/YTSubscribePrageethPerera
▶ Like Us On Facebook: https://bit.ly/PrageethPereraOfficial

Enjoy & Stay Connected With Us For More Videos !!!

#PrageethPerera #Anurawee #SinhalaSongs #SinhalaVideoSongs

snippet.title: #VadiveluComedy  முரட்டு குடிகாரனா இருப்பான் போலயே இந்த நாத்தம் நாறுது | Best Comedy Video HD
snippet.description:
#VadiveluNonStopComedyHD #CheenaThaana001 #CheenaThaana007 #ManivannanMovieComedyVideoHD #PrasanaMovieComedyVideoHD

#VadiveluComedy எவளோ நேக்கா கொத்து விட்டுபோய்ட்டான், மனுஷனுக்கு புது புது வியாதியா வருதே நா என்ன பண்ணுவேன் | Best Comedy Video HD| CheenaThaana

Cheena Thaana 001 is a 2007 Tamil action comedy film starring Prasanna and Sheela. It's a remake of the 2003 Malayalam action-comedy film, C.I.D. Moosa.

Plot
Tamizharasu (Prasanna) wants to become a cop, but the arrogant police officers Inspector Parameshwaran (Manivannan) and AC Gowrishankar (Riyaz Khan) ensure that he does not succeed. Meanwhile, he discovers a plot to assassinate the Governor (Visu) by the terrorist Gulshan Baba (Kazan Khan), and he complains it to Gowrishankar, but discovers that he is also a member of the plot. So he forms a detective agency and starts cracking the plot, and how he succeeds in it with the help of his father (Delhi Ganesh), his father's Friend (Ilavarasu) and, of course, with his friend Cheenichamy (Vadivelu), who is also a thief, forms the rest of the story.

Cast
Prasanna as Tamizharasu
Sheela as Priya
Vadivelu as Seenichamy
Manivannan as Inspector Parameshwaran
Delhi Ganesh as Head Constable Ezhumalai Tamizharasu's father
Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend
Riyaz Khan as ACP Gowrishankar
Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

MovieInfo:
Directed by T. P. Gajendran
Produced by Mid Valley
Story by Udayakrishna-Siby K. Thomas
Starring Prasanna
Sheela
Vadivelu
Livingston
Manivannan
Riyaz Khan
Delhi Ganesh
Music by Deva
Cinematography Raja Rajan
Edited by N. Ganesh
Production
company 
Mid Valley Entertainment
Release date 
7 September 2007

Ilavarasu as Tamizharasu's father's friend

Visu as Vishwanath Reddy, former High Court Judge current Governor of Tamil Nadu
Nizhalgal Ravi as Vijayaraghavan IPS, the Chennai City Police Commissioner
Shanthi Williams as Governor's wife
T. P. Gajendran as a Madman

snippet.description:

පාන් පිටි කෝප්ප 1

අමු මිරිස් කරල් 1-2
කරපිංචා 
ගම්මිරිස් කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1/2
සූදුරු තේ හැඳි 1/2
ලුණු කුඩු තේ හැඳි 1 (රස අනුව)
පොල් තෙල්

වතුර කෝප්ප 1/2
බිත්තර 1

1/2 cup atta flour
(else use 1/2 cup extra
plain flour)

curry leaves

coconut oil

1 egg

මේ සතියේ B&B What's in My Bag Segment එකට අපිත් එක්ක එකතු වෙන්නේ දෙරණ නාලිකාවේ විකාශනය වන "සිදු" නාට්‍යයේ "රුක්ෂි" ගේ චරිතයට පන පොවන ඉතා හුරුබුහුටි නවක නිළියක් වන අමන්දා ජයරත්න.

මේ සුන්දර තරුණිය එදිනෙදා ජිවිතයේ ගෙනියන Bag එකේ මොනවාද තියෙන්නෙ කියලා අපිත් එක්ක බෙදාගත්තේ මෙන්න මෙහෙමයි.

Location Provider : Cafe Noir Blanc [https://www.facebook.com/CafeNoirSriLanka]

Production : IdeaHell

snippet.title: Magnificent Mayers 210* in Stunning Win! | Bangladesh v West Indies Day 5 1st Test - Highlights
snippet.description:
Test debutant Kyle Mayers hit an incredible unbeaten 210 as West Indies completed the fifth highest run chase in Test history against Bangladesh in Chittagong. The Windies chased down 395 to win by three wickets, with 15 balls remaining in the final hour of the first Test.

This is the official channel for the West Indies cricket team, providing all the latest highlights, interviews and features to keep you up to date with all things Windies. 

Subscribe to the channel here!
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC2MHTOXktfTK26aDKyQs3cQ?view_as=subscriber

Find out more about the Windies at:
http://Windiescricket.com

snippet.title: Infinix Smart HD 2021 Unboxing & First Impressions  🇱🇰 Best Smartphone Under 20000? Sinhala Review
snippet.description:
Infinix launched Sri Lanka this Smart HD 2021 for just Rs.20,490/=. This is a budget smartphone that comes with good and decent features as per price but how good this really is you can check the video to know more. Also includes Infinix smart hd 2021 unboxing. 

Buying Link :  https://www.facebook.com/techtrixlk
                        or call us on : 077 775 3877  - 071 791 9241

Another Brand Buying Link : 
Huawei : https://click.daraz.lk/e/_eDYOl
Samsung : https://click.daraz.lk/e/_eBIJ0

Poco : https://click.daraz.lk/e/_eeWIK
Oppo : https://click.daraz.lk/e/_eDD3x
Xiaomi : https://click.daraz.lk/e/_eeWIK

Infinix Smart HD 2021 Specs

6.1” HD+ Drop Notch display, 19.5:9 Aspect ratio, LCD IPS, 500 NITS, 85% Screen to body ratio, In-Cell, Eye Care mode, 720*1560 resolution, 1200:1 Contrast Ratio
"8MP (f 2.0), Dual LED Flash
Picture Modes : Auto Scene detection, Portrait, AI HDR, AI Beauty, PanoramaVideo Modes: FHD Video recording"
"5MP (f 2.0) AI Selfie with Dual LED Flash. Front Camera Modes: AI HDR, AI Beauty, WideSelfie, PortraitVideo Modes: FHD Video recording"
5000mAh(35hrs 4G Talk-, 25 hrs Music Playback (Speakers), 28 hrs Video Playback (Headset,720p), 121 hrs Music (Headset), 12 hrs Web Surfing, 14 hrs Gaming, 34 days Standby time)
XOS v6.2 based on Android 10 (Go Edition)
195 gm, 158.3 * 75.17 * 9.8 mm 
Helio A20 (12nm) Quad-Core 64 bit processor, 1.8 Ghz, GPU – IMG GE8300
2GB + 32GB
3 Slots (Dual nano SIM + Micro SD).
Dedicated memory card slot . Expandable memory upto 256GB
G-SENSOR/PROXIMITY SENSOR/FINGERPRINT/Ambient Light
Fingerprint sensor & Face Unlock
DTS Surround Sound
BT 5.0, GPS, WiFi2.4G，WiFi5G，FM
GSM/GPRS/EDGE- B2/3/5/8; WCDMA - B1/5/8; LTE - B1/3/5/7/8/20/B38/B40/B41
Dual VoLTE, VoWiFi Enabled
Obsidian Black,Quartz Green ,Topaz Blue
Gem Cut Texture design
In box - Adaptor, Micro USB Cable, Protective Film, TPU Case, UM, Warranty Card

Welcome to Ven Kagama Sirinanda Thero you tube channel, we Viharadhipathi of Pirimaniyagama Siri Samadhi Viharaya and Founder of Siri Samadhi Buddhist Counseling Center. The Most Venerable Kagama Sirinanda Thero (Galkiriyagama Hamuduruwo) preached the Dhamma sermons on how to lead the people of Sri Lanka and the world in good ways and see them in the life of true Buddhism and fulfilling their duty as a true human being.

snippet.title: ජෝති හඩද ? ආයෙත් ඇවිත් ද ?මුනම් මාරයි  .සුනෙත් සමග කතාව .Talk with Suneth Udayaratne
snippet.description:
අවදානය පිණිසයි .මෙම වැඩසටහන සම්පුර්ණ නරබා කමෙන්ට් කරන්න .කිසිම අයුරකින් ජොති හඩට සම කර නැත සුනෙත් නම් ඔහු ඔහු කියන්නෙත් එයමය.වැඩසටහන නරබා ඔහු ගැන කමෙන්ට් කරන්න අප නොව ඔබයි ඔහු ජොතිපාල ශුරින්ට සමකරන්නේ එය නවතා ඔහුට සුබ පතන්න......ස්තුතියි 
මෙ සියල්ල නැසිගිය HR ජොතිපාල ශුරින්ට උපහාර වේවා ..
ආයුබෝවන් මගේ රත්තරං යහලුවනේ .මම නීවේදක. චන්දන පලිහවඩන මේ මගේ නිල යුටියුබ් චැනල් එක .ඔබේ දක්ෂකම් රටට පෙන්වන්න අප සූදානම් කතාකරන්න .0785480772. 
Chandana palihawadana .announcer

snippet.title: BIG MOMENT | RAHUL GANDHI Join In Village Cooking | Mushroom Biryani | Village Cooking Channel
snippet.description:
Today we have a Big Moment. Rahul Gandhi Joining our cooking and he encouraged us a lot. 

Today we cook mushroom biryani recipe by using traditional and healthy ingredients. Rahul Gandhi Enjoying mushroom biryani by eating with us. We never forget this big moment in our life. Thank you so much Rahul sir for this great opportunity.

snippet.description:
Watch the latest Episode of popular Tamil Serial #KannanaKanne that airs on Sun TV.

You can now watch your favourite serials Free on Sun NXT. Offer Valid till 25th Feb 2021
 
Kannana Kanne is a family drama serial on Sun TV. Goutham, a rich businessman despises his daughter Meera as he holds her responsible for the loss of his beloved wife and immense wealth on the day she was born. Though Meera shares a special bond with her stepmother and stepsister, she grows up yearning for her father’s love and affection. Will destiny pave the way for Meera to win over her father’s heart.

snippet.title: Chhor Denge: Parampara Tandon | Sachet-Parampara | Nora Fatehi, Ehan Bhat | Arvindr K, Bhushan Kumar
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Chhor Denge", a brand new song in the voice of “Parampara Tandon" featuring Nora Fatehi & Ehan Bhat. The lyrics of new song are penned by Yogesh Dubey &  music composed by Sachet-Parampara. The video is directed by Arvindr Khaira.

snippet.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
snippet.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන.. 

🔺 පොඩියට පටන් ගත්තු ක්‍රිකට් අවුල මහා ප්‍රශ්නයක් වුණේ මෙහෙමයි.. 
🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

localized.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
localized.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන.. 

🔺 පොඩියට පටන් ගත්තු ක්‍රිකට් අවුල මහා ප්‍රශ්නයක් වුණේ මෙහෙමයි.. 
🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

si.title: ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාවේ අනාගතය කොයිබටද? | Satana | සටන | Sri Lanka Cricket 26.01.2021
si.description:
▶️ ක්‍රිකට් ක්‍රීඩාව වර්තමානයේ ඇද වැටී තත්ත්වය පිළිබඳ කළ සටන වැඩසටහන. 

✍️ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රිකට් නායකයින් වන බන්දුල වර්ණපුර, අර්ජුන රණතුංග, සනත් ජයසූරිය සහ හිටපු ටෙස්ට් ක්‍රීඩක අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන සමග සටන..

🔺 දැන් ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්නේ තමන් ගොඩ යන්න, ඉස්සර ගැහුවේ රට ගොඩ දාන්න - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 කෝටි 2ක ජනතාව⁣ට අපි වගකියන්න ඕන - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 ගාල්ලෙදි ස්වීප්, රිවස් ස්වීප් ගහනවනම් ප්‍රශ්නයක් තියෙන්න ඕන. ඇයි අපිට ස්පිනර්ස්ලා නැද්ද? - සනත් ජයසූරිය 
🔺 අරවින්දව,සනත්ව දවස් 3ක් පුහුණු කරානම් අර එංගලන්තේ ස්පිනස්ලා දෙන්නට මැරෙනකන් ගහන්න තිබ්බා - අර්ජුන රණතුංග
🔺 කුසල් මෙන්ඩිස් දක්ෂ දරුවෙක්: ක්‍රිකට් ගහන්න ඕන Facebook එකේ් නෙමෙයි, ග්‍රවුන්ඩ් එකේ  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 ක්‍රිකට් පරිපාලනය භාර ගන්න කැමතියි..  - අර්ජුන රණතුංග  
🔺 දැන් ඉන්න ක්‍රීඩා ඇමති නාමල්ටත් ක්‍රිකට් හදන්න බැරිනම් කාටවත් හදන්න බෑ -  බන්දුල වර්ණපුර   
🔺 පළමු ඉනිම, දෙවැනි ඉනිම නිසා තරගාවලිය පරාජය වුණා කියන්න ඕනනම් කෝච් කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍ය නෑ. වගකීම භාරගන්න කෙනෙක් අවශ්‍යයි. - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන  
🔺 කොන්ටිටි එක වැඩි වෙලා කොලිටි එක නැතිවෙලා - අවිශ්ක ගුණවර්ධන

snippet.title: வருந்துகிறோம் ! | சகோ.A. அப்பாத்துரை கர்த்தருக்குள் நித்திரையடைந்தார்கள் !
snippet.description:
வருந்துகிறோம் ! | சகோ.A. அப்பாத்துரை கர்த்தருக்குள் நித்திரையடைந்தார்கள் !

OBITUARY ANNOUNCEMENT

Jesus Redeems family is deeply saddened to inform  that Bro. A. Appadurai,  Trustee, Jesus Redeems Ministries, finished his race and has left for his heavenly abode. 

Requesting your prayers for his family members

Funeral service will be held on Monday (08.02.2021) @ 9AM at CSI Church, Shanthi Nagar, Palayamkottai 

Deeply mourned by,
Bro. Mohan C Lazarus & Staffs of Jesus Redeems Ministry, Newlife Society & Good Samaritan Club.


#Rip #appadurai #சகோஅப்பாத்துரை #trustee  #bro_appadurai #jesusredeems 

Visit us @ https://www.jesusredeems.com

snippet.title: Ghost Scenario - The Reality | Jump Cuts | Hari & Naresh
snippet.description:
Make meaningful connections without stepping out of your house. Download happn now :
http://gethap.pn/Iw5k
--
For Business Enquiries : jumpcuts16@gmail.com
___________________________________

Have you had a savage ghost video or ghost in the house? Jump Cuts presents a video of “Ghost Scenario.” 

That creepy 2 am call from Ramesh has raised too many questions in his friend’s mind. He goes to the terrace to meet Ramesh, but alas! There’s no one. 

Suddenly, he sees Ramesh standing there. His body shivered with fear. Ramesh kept his hand on his friend’s shoulder and was about to tell a secret. Just when he opened his mouth, the phone rang. It’s Ramesh’s mother’s call. He learns from Ramesh’s mother that Ramesh is dead.

Why did Ramesh call his friend to the terrace? What secret does he want to say? 

If Ramesh is dead, who was calling? Find out in “Ghost Scenario” - a scary short video. Stay tuned to Jump Cuts for the full video.

#Ghostscenario #ghostinhouse #Jumpcuts
___________________________________

snippet.title: 🤯 LATE COMEBACK DRAMA! | HIGHLIGHTS | Granada 3-5 Barça
snippet.description:
With just two minutes to play, Barça looked to be heading out of the cup when the blaugrana pressure finally paid off, the away side scoring two late goals to take the game into extra time. In the additional 30 minutes, Ronald Koeman's side secured their place in the semi-finals with goals from Griezmann, De Jong and Jordi Alba to seal victory! Check out the highlights!

snippet.title: Pavithra Wanniarachchi transferred to IDH | MY TV SRI LANKA
snippet.description:
Health Minister Pavithra Wanniarachchi who was infected with Covid-19 has been transferred to the Infection Disease Hospital (IDH) in Angoda yesterday evening.

After being diagnosed with Covid-19, she was admitted to a treatment center in Hikkakaduwa.

snippet.title: 23 SMART LIFE HACKS FOR EVERY OCCASION
snippet.description:
Ways to make your life easier with these fantastic hacks. 

As we go through life, we come across little problems that seem unsolvable. But today, we’re going to show you some fun tricks you can try that will help save you time and hassle. Like when you have to sign a bunch of documents all at once. One way to fix that is to tape some pens on a piece of paper (Somewhat diagonally) and then use them to write. Now let’s head to the kitchen, where you need to make perfectly round crepes for your guests. You don’t need to buy an expensive crepe tool that flattens them out and turns them into a perfect circle — you just need a chopstick or a skewer instead. You break it in the middle, create a 90-degree angle, and voila. Did you know you can use an old highlighter to paint or write stuff down on your tablet? Watch the video to see how to do it. 

Timestamps: 
1:04 — Perfectly round crepes
2:02 — No cake plates? Try this hack 
3:09 — Avoid staining your shirt collar with this trick 
5:08 — DIY fake nose ring 
6:16 — A way to cut package tape 
8:12 — DIY compass using three pencils

This video is made for entertainment purposes. We do not make any warranties about the completeness, safety and reliability. Any action you take upon the information on this video is strictly at your own risk, and we will not be liable for any damages or losses. It is the viewer's responsibility to use judgment, care and precautions if one plans to replicate.

The following video might feature activity performed by our actors within controlled environment- please use judgment, care, and precaution if you plan to replicate.

snippet.title: I Spent 100 Hours Customizing The World's Largest PS5 ($70,000)
snippet.description:
I can't believe we spent 100 hours customizing the world's largest Playstation 5 and gave PS5's away to subscribers lol

Hope you enjoyed! Subscribe right now and you'll be a part of the giveaways! Thanks for watching :)

If you're not yet subscribed, I promise you won't regret subscribing! If you're already subscribed, I love you! ❤️
Subscribe and you might be picked to be in my next video! It's free and it would genuinely make me super happy if you subscribed! 🥺

ZHC Crafts: @ZHC Crafts

snippet.title: සබීතා ගෝඨාගේ සිරියහනට
snippet.description:
https://lrnews.ch/
https://www.facebook.com/d.m.thushara.jayarathna.3
Im D.M. Thushara Jayarathna and studied at Ananda Sastralaya, Kotte. Im working as an Investigative Web Journalist For my higher studies, I joined with Sabaragamuwa University, Management Faculty as a management student and after that I joined to Sri Lanka Law College as a Law student. I have won the Gold medal addressing Juri competition and as well as I was the Captain of Law College Debating Team. 
 
I'm the one who made complain against Mr. Namal Rajapaksha, son of former president Mr. Mahinda Rajapaksha regarding cheating the Law College Examination. After that incident, I faced political problems and life threats. Due to this reason, In the year of 2012 I left my country and currently I'm living in Switzealand. 
 
 
I dedicated my life to establish Democracy and Rule of Law of my country.

snippet.title: My Home Tour | Welcome to Makapa home | Part 01 | Mr Makapa
snippet.description:
#MyHomeTour #WelcometoMakapahome #Housetour

After an exciting Ooty trip, Mr. Makapa takes you through his house. Would you like to go inside?

Actor Makapa Anand has won many Vijay TV awards. The awards and the trophies are the extraordinary achievements of his life.

He talks about his favorite memories with his daughter and actor Thalapathy Vijay. 

Makapa likes to travel. You can see the souvenirs of different countries he has visited. 

Makapa’s favorite spot is the terrace. He likes to sit in the backdrop of Bamboo trees. The city view looks astonishing from the top.

Actor Makapa likes to collect small things. Experience the joy of little things in this “My Home Tour” video. 

Also, subscribe to Mr. Makapa for more exciting videos.

____________________________________________

#MrMakapa is a channel where I'm going to share connect with you personally with my Vlogs, live Streams and much more.

snippet.title: 菌子——云南人的“本命菜”【滇西小哥】
snippet.description:
云南冬天虽然也有温暖如春的太阳，但是山里没有菌子，去和种菌子的叔叔要了几个菌包来，悉心照料几天就长出了可爱的菌子，格外鲜甜肥美，清炒，炖汤，油炸统统吃一遍！
云南人吃菌子的喜爱是无可替代的，不管是山上长的还是地里种的，都能变着花样的吃，而且总吃不腻～

※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

In winter, though the sun shines just like that in the spring, there's no fungus in the mountains. I asked for some fungus bags from a fungus farmer. After a few days, there grows some lovely fungi. These fungi are very sweet and tender. So I stir-fried, stewed and deep-fried them one by one.
Nothing beats Yunnan people's love for fungus. No matter they are found in mountains or harvested from fields, we are never tired of eating them in various ways.

大家好！我是滇西小哥，一个地道的云南妹子，如果你喜欢我的视频，请持续关注我的频道，
我会在不同的平台分享我的生活，以及云南特色美食，祝你们天天开心，每天都有美食相伴～

bn.title: মাশরুম- ইউনানের মানুষের জন্য স্থানীয় কিন্তু সুস্বাদু প্রিয় রান্না
bn.description:
※মেনু বারের নীচের ডানদিকে কোণার সিসি বোতামটি ক্লিক করুন এবং সংশ্লিষ্ট ভাষায় সাবটাইটেল উপস্থিত হবে!

ইউনানে শীতকালে রোদ এবং গরম হলেও, পাহাড়ে কোন মাশরুম নেই। আমি আমার কাকাবাবুর থেকে শুধু কয়েক ব্যাগ মাশরুমের ব্যাগ চেয়েছিলাম যিনি গাছের বিষয়ে দক্ষ, যত্ন সহকারে কয়েক দিন দেখাশোনা করুন, আপনি সুন্দর দেখতে মাশরুম পেতে পারেন যা খুবই কোমল এবং মিষ্টি যেটা ভাঁজলে, সেলাই করলে, তেলে ভাঁজলে সুন্দর একটা স্বাদ আসে!

মাশরুমের প্রতি ভালোবাসা, হয় পাহাড়ে নিজেই হয় বা মাঠে লাগানো হয়, ইউনানের মানুষের জন্য এটি অপূরণীয়। তারা এটিকে বিভিন্ন রকমের কাজে লাগাবে, যা এটিকে একটা নতুন স্বাদ দেবে~

সবাইকে অভিবাদন! আমি ডায়ানজি জিয়াওজে, ইউনান প্রদেশের স্থানীয় এক মেয়ে, আপনি যদি আমার ভিডিও পছন্দ করেন তবে দয়া করে আমার চ্যানেলটি অনুসরণ করুন, আমি ইউনান্নে আমার জীবন এবং বিশেষ খাবারগুলি বিভিন্ন প্ল্যাটফর্মে শেয়ার করব, আমি আপনাকে প্রতিদিন সুখী করতে চাই এবং প্রতিদিন সুস্বাদু খাবার খাওয়া~

vi.title: Nấm  --- “món ăn bổn mạng” của người Vân Nam
vi.description:
※click chuột nhấn vào cc ở góc dưới bên phải màn hình, thì sẽ có bản sub tương ứng với ngôn ngữ của bạn xuất hiện rồi !

Mùa đông ở Vân Nam mặc dù cũng có mặt trời ấm áp như mùa xuân, nhưng ở trên rừng không có nấm, đi đến nhà chú trồng nấm để lấy mấy bao nấm về, chăm sóc cẩn thận vài ngày, cây nấm đáng yêu đã mọc ra rồi, bên ngoài tươi ngon mẫm, xào, hầm canh, chiên dầu đều ăn hết một lượt!
Sở thích ăn nấm của người Vân Nam là không thể nào thay thế được, không cần biết là mọc ở trên rừng hay trồng ở dưới đất, đều có thể làm thành rất nhiều cách để ăn, hơn nữa lại còn ăn không ngấy~

Chào các bạn! Tôi là Điền Tây tiểu ca, một cô gái  chính hiệu của tỉnh Vân Nam, nếu như các bạn thích video của tôi, có thể tiếp tục theo dõi trang của tôi, tôi sẽ chia sẻ cuộc sống của tôi ở các  trang,  và các món ăn đặc sắc của Vân Nam, chúc các bạn luôn luôn vui vẻ, ngày nào cũng có ẩm thực bầu bạn~

th.title: เห็ด - "อาหารโปรด" -- ชาวยูนนานชอบเป็นชีวิตจิตใจ
th.description:
※คลิกปุ่ม "คำบรรยาย" ที่แถบเมนูด้านล่างขวาเพื่อเลือกแสดงซับไตเติ้ลภาษาไทย

ในฤดูหนาวแม้ว่ามีแดดเช่นเดียวกับฤดูใบไม้ผลิ 
แต่บนภูเขาก็ไม่มีเห็ดให้เก็บ
ฉันจึงไปขอถุงเชื้อเห็ดจากคุณลุงที่เพาะเห็ด
ดูแลเพียงไม่กี่วันเชื้อก็ออกเป็นเห็ดที่สวยงาม
เห็ดเหล่านี้หวาน,นิ่ม,อวบ น่ากินมาก 
นำมาปรุงเป็นผัด, ตุ๋นและทอด
สำหรับชาวยูนนานแล้ว 
ความชอบเห็ดไม่มีอะไรมาแทนได้
ไม่ว่าจะเป็นเห็ดที่เก็บจากภูเขาหรือเห็ดที่เพาะเอง
เรานำมาทำเป็นอาหารได้หลากหลายรูปแบบ
 ~ กินได้ไม่มีเบื่อเลยค่ะ ! ~

สวัสดีค่ะ เพื่อน ๆ ทุกคน !
ฉันคือเตียนซี เสี่ยวเกอ (Dianxi Xiaoge-滇西小哥)
เป็นสาวชาวพื้นเมืองจากมณฑลยูนนาน ประเทศจีน
หากคุณชื่นชอบวิดีโอนี้กรุณากด "ติดตาม" ช่องของฉันด้วยค่ะ
ฉันจะได้นำเสนอเรื่องราวของฉันและอาหารตามแบบฉบับของยูนนาน มาแบ่งปันต่อไป
ขอให้คุณมีความสุขและเพลิดเพลินกับอาหารอร่อยทุก ๆ วันด้วยค่ะ

hi.title: मशरूम-- युन्नान लोगों की "अपरिहार्य व्यंजन"
hi.description:
※नीचे दाऐ कोना मेनू बार में सीसी बटन पर क्लिक करें, तो संबंधित भाषा में उपशीर्षक दिखाई होगी। 

हालांकि युन्नान के सर्दियों में गर्म वसंत सूरज भी है, लेकिन पहाड़ों में कोई मशरूम नहीं है। जो मशरूम उगाते हैं, उस चाचा से मैंने कुछ प्लुरोटस ओस्ट्रीटस बैग लाया। कुछ दिनों की देखभाल  के बाद, प्यारे प्लुरोटस ओस्ट्रीटस बढे। काफी ताज़ा मिठा और स्वादिष्ट है। हलचल-तलना, स्टू और डीप फ्राई सब बनाकर खा लेते हैं। मशरूम खाने का युन्नान लोगों का प्यार अपूरणीय होता है। चाहे पहाड़ पर बढा हो या जमीन में उगाया गया हो, तो विभिन्न तरीकों से खाया जा सकता है। और कभी भी मशरूम खाने से नहीं थक रहा है। 

सभी को नमस्कार, मैं दिअन षि षीओग, युन्नान की एक असली छोटी बहन। अगर आपको मेरा वीडियो पसंद है तो मेरे चैनल को देखना जारी रखें। मैं विभिन्न प्लेटफार्मों पर अपने जीवन और युन्नान विशिष्टताओं को साझा करूं, मुझे ख्वाइश है कि आप हर दिन खुश रहें स्वादिष्ट भोजन के साथ ~

en.title: Fungus - Favorite Ingredient of Yunnan People
en.description:
※Click "cc" on the lower right menu to choose your subtitle language.

In winter, though the sun shines just like that in the spring, there's no fungus in the mountains. I asked for some fungus bags from a fungus farmer. After a few days, there grows some lovely fungi. These fungi are very sweet and tender. So I stir-fried, stewed and deep-fried them one by one.
Nothing beats Yunnan people's love for fungus. No matter they are found in mountains or harvested from fields, we are never tired of eating them in various ways.

Hello, everyone! I am Dianxi Xiaoge, a Yunnan native. If you enjoy my videos, please keep subscribing to my channel.
I'll continue to share my life and Yunnan-sytled food in my uploads. Wish you have a happy life and enjoy tasty food every day.

id.title: Jamur – “Hidangan Istimewa” Orang Yunnan.
id.description:
※Tekan tombol pada menu di kanan bawah, maka akan muncul subtitle dengan bahasa yang sesuai!

Meskipun musim dingin di Yunnan juga ada matahari yang hangat seperti musim dingin, tetapi di gunung tidak ada jamur. Aku telah meminta beberapa jamur dari seorang paman pembudi daya jamur. Dalam beberapa hari, telah tumbuh jamur-jamur yang imut. Tampak segar dan indah. Ditumis, di godok dengan sup ataupun digoreng, semua dicicipi!

Kegemaran orang Yunnan makan jamur memang tidak bisa tergantikan. Tidak peduli apakah yang tumbuh di gunung atau yang ditanam di kebun, semuanya bisa dimakan dengan beraneka ragam cara, dan juga tidak membosankan.

Halo semuanya. Aku adalah Dianxi Xiaoge, seorang gadis khas Yunnan. Jika kalian menyukai videoku, silakan terus ikuti saluranku ini. Aku akan berbagi kehidupanku dan makanan lezat khas Yunnan di platform yang berbeda. Semoga kalian setiap hari berbahagia, dan setiap hari selalu ditemani makanan lezat~

ko.title: 버섯——운남 사람의 “혼메이(本命) 요리”
ko.description:
※우측 상단 메뉴의 cc버튼을 클릭하시면 원하시는 언어의 자막이 나옵니다!

운남은 겨울에도 봄과 같이 따뜻하게 내리쬐는 태양이 있지만, 산에 버섯들이 자라지 않습니다. 버섯을 심으시는 아저씨에게 균표를 몇개 얻어왔는데요. 며칠동안 정성스럽게 키웠더니 귀여운 버섯이 자라났습니다. 그래서 그런지 더 향긋하고 더 맛있더라구요. 볶음, 찌개, 튀김 모든 방식으로 한 개씩 요리를 해먹었습니다. 
운남 사람들의 버섯 사랑은 그 무엇도 대체가 불가능합니다. 산에서 난 것이든 땅에 심은 것이든, 여러가지 방식으로 먹지만, 또 절대 질리지가 않죠~

여러분 안녕하세요! 저는 전서소가(뎬시샤오꺼) 운남 본토 아가씨 입니다. 제 영상이 마음에 드신다면 계속해서 제 채널을 구독해주세요.
저는 몇가지 플랫폼에서 제 일상과 운남 특색 미식들을 공유하고있습니다. 여러분 좋은하루되시고 매일 맛있는 음식과 함께하시길 바라겠습니다~

Instagram【dianxixiaoge_apenjie】▶https://bit.ly/2Wagkze
